name: pr-template-generator
description: Generate comprehensive pull request descriptions that help reviewers understand changes quickly a...
capabilities: Generate feature PR descriptions with structured templates
Create bug fix documentation with root cause analysis
Build refactoring PRs with before/after comparisons
Include breaking changes and migration guides
Suggest related issues and reviewer assignments
author: CuriousLearner
securitySummary: Pure prompt-based skill providing PR documentation guidelines. Contains no executable code, file access, network operations, or credential handling. All static findings are false positives from documentation examples being misinterpreted as code.
valueStatement: Create comprehensive pull request descriptions that help reviewers understand changes quickly and improve code review quality. Generate structured templates for features, bug fixes, and refactors with checklists and context.
limitations: Does not access git repositories directly
Does not execute git commands or analyze code
User must provide change context manually
Does not integrate with GitHub or GitLab APIs

useCases.title: Document feature additions
useCases.description: Create detailed PR descriptions for new features with motivation, implementation details, and testing strategy.

useCases.title: Track bug fix details
useCases.description: Document bug fixes with root cause analysis, impact assessment, and deployment considerations.

useCases.title: Review code refactors
useCases.description: Generate comprehensive refactor documentation with architecture changes and migration guides.

promptTemplates.title: Simple PR
promptTemplates.prompt: @pr-template-generator Generate a pull request description for a feature that adds user authentication with OAuth support.

promptTemplates.title: Bug Fix
promptTemplates.prompt: @pr-template-generator --type bugfix Create a PR description for fixing a memory leak in the websocket handler.

promptTemplates.title: Refactor
promptTemplates.prompt: @pr-template-generator --type refactor Generate documentation for refactoring the payment processing module.

promptTemplates.title: Complete PR
promptTemplates.prompt: @pr-template-generator --include-screenshots Create a comprehensive PR description for a UI overhaul.

bestPractices: Include the problem statement and solution approach in every description
Add screenshots or diagrams for visual changes to the codebase
Link related issues and explain breaking changes clearly to reviewers
antiPatterns: Using vague titles like Update code or Fix stuff in PR descriptions
Skipping testing information and checklist items for reviewers
Assuming reviewers have full context of the changes without explanation

faq.question: Which platforms support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Use @pr-template-generator to invoke it.

faq.question: What types of PRs can this generate?
faq.answer: It generates templates for features, bug fixes, refactoring, documentation updates, and performance improvements.

faq.question: Does it connect to GitHub or GitLab?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates descriptions based on your input. It does not access repositories or APIs directly.

faq.question: Is my code or data shared anywhere?
faq.answer: No. This skill runs entirely in your AI session. No data is transmitted to external servers.

faq.question: Can I customize the templates?
faq.answer: Yes, you can extend the prompts with flags like --type, --include-screenshots, or --minimal to customize output.

faq.question: How is this different from GitHub PR templates?
faq.answer: GitHub templates provide static forms. This skill generates dynamic, context-aware descriptions based on your specific changes.
